steps.title: Spot the central gesture
steps.content: The strongest signal is the repeated language of command and calling: Go forth, Great reaches...await for your possession, and life is calling you. These establish a single purpose — the mother is urging her son toward life's opportunities.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly states the purpose — to encourage the child to embrace the experiences life will offer. The mother sends him forward with her blessing toward unknown possibilities ahead. The other three either reverse the family dynamic, shift focus elsewhere, or impose a cautionary tone. That matches choice D — D is correct.
